title: Design template and token management for UI component generation
purpose: Provides pre-built UI templates and design token presets for rapid design creation and management of design variables.
module_context: Exports schema definitions for template creation and token management, token preset mappings, and template generator functions for various UI components.

methods.name: handleCreateFromTemplate
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, designId: string, template: string, params: Record<string, any>, parentId?: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; nodeIds: Record<string, string>; rootNodeId: string }>

steps.content: Look up the template generator function for the specified template name.
IF no generator is found, throw an error listing available templates.
Generate the tree specification using the template generator and provided parameters.
Create the design from the generated tree specification using the design creation handler.
Generate a unique identifier using timestamp and random string.

methods.name: handleCreateDesignTokens
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, designId: string, preset?: string, custom?: Partial<TokenSet>): Promise<{ success: boolean; collectionId: string; variableIds: string[] }>

steps.content: Resolve the token set from either a preset or custom input.
IF no token set is provided, throw an error listing available presets.
Load the existing design content from the backing store.
Ensure the design content has variable collections and variables structures.
Generate a unique identifier for the new variable collection and mode.
Create color variables from the token set and add them to the design.
Create typography variables from the token set and add them to the design.
Create spacing variables from the token set and add them to the design.
Create radii variables from the token set and add them to the design.
Add the new variable collection to the design content.
Update the design with the modified content containing new variables.

methods.name: handleApplyDesignTokens
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, designId: string, nodeId: string, bindings: Record<string, string>): Promise<{ success: boolean; appliedBindings: Record<string, string> }>

steps.content: Load the existing design content from the backing store.
IF the design has no nodes, throw an error.
Find the target node by ID in the design content.
IF the node is not found, throw an error.
Look up each variable by name in the design's variables.
IF a variable is not found, throw an error.
Bind the variable to the node using the variable alias type.
Update the design with the modified content containing applied bindings.
